subject: Constitutional Law
module: Articles 43, 44 and 45 — Property, Religion and Directive Principles

lessons.title: Right to Private Property — Article 43
lessons.description: In a country experiencing a prolonged housing and land use crisis, the interface between constitutional property rights and the demands of the common good has never been more practically significant.

lessons.title: Freedom of Religion — Article 44
lessons.description: Let us begin with the constitutional text in its current form. Article 44.1 provides: "The State acknowledges that the homage of public worship is due to Almighty God.

lessons.title: Directive Principles — Article 45
lessons.description: Let us begin with the text. Article 45 opens with a preamble: "The principles of social policy set forth in this Article are intended for the general guidance of the Oireachtas.
